---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Description

Describe the problem this feature would solve. Is it related to a specific use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. How should this feature work?

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative approaches you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, examples, or screenshots here.
